name: Gust of Wind
description: A Line of strong wind 60 feet long and 10 feet wide blasts from you in a direction you choose for the spell's duration. Each creature in the Line must spend 2 extra feet of movement for every 1 foot it moves when moving closer to you. Each creature in the Line when it appears must make a Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away in the direction the Line is going. Any creature in the Line must make this saving throw each time it ends its turn there. A creature can take an action to keep from being pushed. The wind disperses gas or vapor.
